narrative:
Precinct Toledo 14I (precinct in Lucas County) has 836 registered voters, with 71.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.2 percentage points.
